steps.title: Complete the square
steps.content: Start with $$y=5x^2-bx-8.$$ Factor $5$ from the $x$ terms: $$y=5\left(x^2-\frac{b}{5}x\right)-8.$$ Half of $\frac{b}{5}$ is $\frac{b}{10}$, so add and subtract $\left(\frac{b}{10}\right)^2$ inside the parentheses.

steps.title: Match the equivalent expression
steps.content: The derived form exactly matches Choice A: $$y=5\left(x-\frac{b}{10}\right)^2-8-\frac{b^2}{20}.$$ Therefore, A is correct.
